message:
Improve robustness of long-running gateway services

context-health.service.ts:
- Wrap async health check in setInterval callback with error handler
- Previously, checkHealth() returned a promise that was not awaited,
  leading to unhandled promise rejections if the check failed
- Now catches and logs errors with session context for debugging

registry-compat.service.ts:
- Cap deprecation log at 500 entries to prevent unbounded memory growth
- In long-running processes, the deprecation array could grow indefinitely
- Now uses FIFO eviction (shift oldest entry) when limit is reached

Also includes routine beads metadata updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
